name: App wiring / frontend / title: missing.workflow.spec
outcome_goal: Drive bugs BUG-AD8C5792 to a terminal outcome with explicit evidence and bounded verification.
anti_requirements: Do NOT widen scope outside the listed bugs and authority owner.
Do NOT resolve FIXED without validates_fix evidence.
Do NOT use ad hoc SQL for bug status or evidence writes.
Do NOT clean up unrelated issues just because they are nearby.

jobs.label: plan_packet
jobs.description: Lock the execution boundary for App wiring / frontend / title: missing.workflow.spec.
jobs.outcome_goal: One plan artifact names the exact touched files, verification path, and closure boundary before implementation starts.
jobs.prompt:
Read the coordination file `/workspace/Code&DBs/Workflow/artifacts/workflow/bug_resolution_program/bug_resolution_program_kickoff_20260428_full.json` and extract packet `bug_resolution_program_20260428_full.wave-1-evidence-normalization-app-wiring-frontend-title-missing-workflow-spec`.

Packet contract:
- bug_ids: ["BUG-AD8C5792"]
- authority_owner: lane:app_wiring_frontend
- lane: App wiring / frontend (app_wiring_frontend)
- wave: wave_1_evidence_normalization
- packet_kind: evidence_recovery
- cluster: title: missing.workflow.spec (bug.title_anchor:missing.workflow.spec)
- verification_surface: Frontend route or asset proof plus app smoke verification for the affected surface
- depends_on_wave: wave_0_authority_repair

Write `Code&DBs/Workflow/artifacts/workflow/bug_resolution_program/packets/wave-1-evidence-normalization-app-wiring-frontend-title-missing-workflow-spec/PLAN.md` with these sections:
1. Bugs in scope
2. Titles in scope
- Missing UI workflow spec directory for ui_atlas_refinement_wave
3. Files to read first
4. Files allowed to change
5. Verification or closure proof required
6. Stop boundary

Use current repo truth, not guesses. Do not edit code in this job.

jobs.label: execute_packet
jobs.description: Implement or close the packet without widening scope.
jobs.outcome_goal: The packet produces either a bounded code fix or a proof-backed closure rationale for every bug in scope.
jobs.prompt:
Read `Code&DBs/Workflow/artifacts/workflow/bug_resolution_program/packets/wave-1-evidence-normalization-app-wiring-frontend-title-missing-workflow-spec/PLAN.md` first.

Then implement the narrowest correct path for packet `bug_resolution_program_20260428_full.wave-1-evidence-normalization-app-wiring-frontend-title-missing-workflow-spec`.

Rules:
- If the right outcome is FIXED, make the smallest durable change and record exactly what verification will prove it.
- If the right outcome is WONT_FIX or DEFERRED, do not force code. Collect the proof and rationale instead.
- Prepare for the closeout job by recording the intended terminal outcome for each bug in `Code&DBs/Workflow/artifacts/workflow/bug_resolution_program/packets/wave-1-evidence-normalization-app-wiring-frontend-title-missing-workflow-spec/EXECUTION.md`.
- Do not resolve bugs in this job.

Done criteria:
- The affected app route, manifest, or asset wiring behaves correctly end to end.
- The fix is verified at the UI or route boundary, not only by internal code inspection.
- If the right outcome is defer or won't-fix, the user-visible impact is recorded clearly.

Stop boundary: Do not redesign the app shell or styling outside the exact broken wiring path.

jobs.label: verify_and_resolve_packet
jobs.description: Run verification, attach bug evidence, and resolve every bug through the bug tracker surface.
jobs.outcome_goal: Each in-scope bug is either left open with a clear blocker or moved to a terminal status with explicit evidence.
jobs.prompt:
Read `Code&DBs/Workflow/artifacts/workflow/bug_resolution_program/packets/wave-1-evidence-normalization-app-wiring-frontend-title-missing-workflow-spec/PLAN.md` and `Code&DBs/Workflow/artifacts/workflow/bug_resolution_program/packets/wave-1-evidence-normalization-app-wiring-frontend-title-missing-workflow-spec/EXECUTION.md`.

Then do the narrowest meaningful verification for the packet.

Closeout rules:
- Use `praxis workflow bugs attach_evidence` and `praxis workflow bugs resolve` only.
- If terminal outcome is FIXED, attach attempted_fix evidence and validates_fix evidence before resolution.
- If terminal outcome is WONT_FIX or DEFERRED, write the proof-backed rationale to `Code&DBs/Workflow/artifacts/workflow/bug_resolution_program/packets/wave-1-evidence-normalization-app-wiring-frontend-title-missing-workflow-spec/CLOSEOUT.md` and resolve through the bug tracker surface.
- If verification fails, leave the bug open and write the blocker in CLOSEOUT.md.

Verification surface: Frontend route or asset proof plus app smoke verification for the affected surface
Stop boundary: Do not redesign the app shell or styling outside the exact broken wiring path.
